name: Shweta Devgan
role: Chief Compliance and Policy Officer, CORD
body: Shweta is the Chief Compliance and Policy Officer at CORD, where she has spent over six years aligning the organisation's dispute resolution products and processes with legal and policy requirements. An NLSIU Bangalore graduate, she focuses on equipping general counsels to resolve disputes digitally, including through TERES. She works remotely from Himachal Pradesh.
